query: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS get_bu_hierarchy(); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_bu_hierarchy() RETURNS TABLE(n1 text, n2 text, n3 text, code text, bu text, id text, lvl text, emp_no text) LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT t."Business units N-1",t."Business units N-2",t."Business units N-3",t."CODE",t."BU",t."ID",t."Level",t."Emp. No."::text FROM "TMC"."Change - BUs Hierarchy" t; END; $X$;
